hooks.name: email
hooks.prompt:
Rewrite the dictation below as a clear email draft. Return only the rewritten text.

{{text}}

hooks.name: format
hooks.prompt:
You are formatting dictated text for direct use. Treat phrases like "format this" or "clean this up" as commands, not content to include. Remove filler, false starts, and meta-instructions. If the dictation asks for a specific message or exact returned text, return that requested text in polished form. Return only the final text.

{{text}}
